name: build-lab-meeting-slides
description: Build editable lab-meeting PowerPoint decks while preserving a supplied PPTX template and enforcing visual-quality regression gates.

interface.shortDescription: Editable research decks from a supplied PPTX template
interface.longDescription: Build editable lab-meeting and research presentation decks from a supplied PowerPoint template with exact-clone editing, native rebuilds, evidence-aware planning, strict template fidelity, visual-contract checks, and SHA-pinned user acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Build a lab-meeting deck from this supplied PPTX template.
Revise this research presentation while preserving the inherited template system.
